[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001100 3
1 00001000 1
2 01110101 5
3 01000000 1
4 11111111 a
5 00000111 3
6 00000100 1
7 11001100 4

12 21 11111111 a match 4

45 54 11001100 4 match 7
56 65 11001101 5
67 76 01011111 6
70 07 01111111 7

14 41 01000100 2
25 52 11111111 a match 4
36 63 01001111 5
47 74 00011110 4
50 05 11111101 7
61 16 01001101 4
72 27 11111111 a match 4

37 73 00011111 5
